Systems Research // Lab 01

An open-ended,
interdisciplinary lab

by Harsh Jinger

"a hiccup in the continuum of knowledge...."

Theoretical Context

Aperiodic Penrose Tiling: A structural "hiccup"—maintaining perfect order without repetition, mimicking the interdisciplinary bridge between private thought and public contribution.
